---
bibliography: []
citeproc: false
csl: apa
format:
  typst:
    output-file: bnr_cvd_cases_2023_v1.pdf
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.65in
      bottom: 0.70in
      left: 0.65in
      right: 0.65in
    mainfont: "Segoe UI"
    fontsize: 10pt
    linkcolor: "#e87a00"
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        #let bnr_grey = rgb("#666666")
        #let bnr_light_grey = rgb("#B8B8B8")
        #let body_font = "Segoe UI"
        #let heading_font = "Segoe UI"

        #set text(font: body_font, size: 10pt)

        #show heading.where(level: 1): set text(
          font: heading_font,
          weight: "semibold",
          size: 14pt
        )

        #show heading.where(level: 2): set text(
          font: heading_font,
          weight: "semibold",
          size: 13pt
        )

        #show heading.where(level: 3): set text(
          font: heading_font,
          weight: "semibold",
          size: 11.2pt
        )

        #set page(
          footer: context [
            #line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: bnr_light_grey, thickness: 0.35pt))
            #v(3pt)
            #grid(
              columns: (1fr, auto),
              [#text(font: body_font, size: 7.3pt, fill: bnr_grey)[Barbados National Registry | The University of the West Indies]],
              [#text(font: body_font, size: 7.3pt, fill: bnr_grey)[Page #counter(page).display("1")]]
            )
          ]
        )
---

```{=typst}
#let bnr_navy = rgb("#001F3D")
#let bnr_sand = rgb("#D89C60")
#let bnr_grey = rgb("#666666")
#let uwi_logo = "../../../../assets/images/uwi-crestonly-20p.png"
#let body_font = "Segoe UI"
#let heading_font = "Segoe UI"

#block[
  #grid(
    columns: (42pt, 1fr),
    column-gutter: 9pt,
    align(top, image(uwi_logo, height: 38pt)),
    [
      #text(font: heading_font, size: 16pt, weight: "semibold", fill: rgb("#000000"))[Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados]
      #linebreak()
      #text(font: body_font, size: 9.4pt, fill: bnr_grey)[Briefing created by the Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies.]
      #linebreak()
      #text(font: body_font, size: 9.4pt, style: "italic", fill: bnr_grey)[Group Contacts • Christina Howitt (BNR lead) • Ian Hambleton (analytics) • Updated on 28 Apr 2026]
    ]
  )
  #v(5pt)
  #align(center)[
    #text(font: body_font, size: 9.4pt, fill: bnr_grey)[For all our surveillance outputs • https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/]
  ]
  #v(5pt)
  #line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("#555555"), thickness: 0.55pt))
]
#v(8pt)
```

{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/why-this-matters.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/what-we-did.qmd >}}

## Key messages

- In 2023, BNR recorded 312 strokes in women and 312 strokes in men.
- BNR recorded 105 heart attacks in women and 141 heart attacks in men.
- Stroke cases remained above the recent five-year average through much of the year.
- A substantial share of cardiovascular events occurred before age 70.

```{=typst}
#v(6pt)
#block(width: 100%)[
  #text(font: "Segoe UI", size: 12.6pt, weight: "semibold")[
    #text(fill: rgb("#8B6FB4"))[Stroke]
    and
    #text(fill: rgb("#A4161A"))[heart attack]
    cases in 2023 compared with the five-year average
  ]
]
#v(3pt)
```

![](../../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_cum_week.png){width=100% fig-alt="Cumulative CVD cases in 2023 compared with the 2018–2022 average."}

{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/main-interpretation.qmd >}}

```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
```

```{=typst}
#v(6pt)
#block(width: 100%)[
  #text(font: "Segoe UI", size: 12.6pt, weight: "semibold")[
    Proportion of
    #text(fill: rgb("#8B6FB4"))[stroke]
    and
    #text(fill: rgb("#A4161A"))[heart attack]
    cases occurring before age 70
  ]
]
#v(3pt)
```

![](../../../../downloads/files/briefings/cvd_cases_2023_v1/figures/cases_2023_age70.png){width=100% fig-alt="Age distribution of hospital-registered stroke and heart attack cases."}

{{< include ../../../../_shared/snippets/briefings/cvd/cvd_cases_2023_v1/premature-disease.qmd >}}

## Outputs

Tables, figure data, metadata, and build records are available in the online briefing.

## Citation

```{=typst}
#text(font: "Segoe UI", size: 8.4pt, fill: rgb("#666666"))[
  Barbados National Registry. #emph[Hospital Cardiovascular Cases in Barbados: BNR CVD case-count briefing, 2023]. Barbados National Chronic Disease Registry, The University of the West Indies. Available at: #link("https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-counts.html")[https://uwi-bnr.github.io/info-hub/surveillance/cvd/briefings/case-counts.html]. Accessed: [insert date accessed].
]
```
